lineage.method: v_alpha_v1_lsk3 11-factor + SP-A liq_cascade_recency_score_5d (per-subject 1h liquidation cascade impulse-response, exponential-decay 5-day recency). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

doc_e12_falsification_2026_04_29.result: PASS — t=+10.75 strongly significant, 4× the doc 2.5σ floor

admission_audit_2026_04_29.weight_calibration: Conservative initial pick. Raw IC 0.052 × v91 ratio 3.25 = 0.17 (would be aggressive). F62 lesson at IC -0.024 → w=-0.08 was Pareto-optimal; transferring that ratio (~3.3) to recency_score gives w≈0.17 but conservatism suggests starting at 0.10 (~50% of theoretical) and scanning up.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-A v6 score: extends v_alpha_v1_lsk3 by adding liq_cascade_recency_score_5d (per-subject 1h liquidation cascade exponential-decay 5d recency accumulator). Doc §E.12 mechanism: CoinGlass 1h liquidation flow identifies cascade events; the 24-72h post-cascade window has documented mean reversion. Cross-sectionally, assets with HIGHER recent cascade intensity OUTPERFORM in next 5 days (post-cascade recovery alpha). Sign empirical: POSITIVE. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score adds +0.05 * z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d). Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Doc §E.12 prescribes mean reversion 24-72h after cascade; the 5d recency window covers the full mean-reversion horizon. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.3 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g_v2 (+2.147) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.0 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) doc §E.12 universe-pooled post-cascade 24h abnormal return t-stat falls below 2.5σ on this panel.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.05*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

delta_vs_lsk3_g_v2.rotation_high_vol_2025q4: +0.527 (best regime improvement of any factor in M2.x)

weight_calibration_journey.w_0_10_initial: walk-forward +2.496 BEST EVER, but rotation_high_vol_2025q4 collapsed to -2.322 (regime FAIL, below v10 -2.0 floor). Same pattern as W3.5 v1 — strong factor with regime tail risk needs throttling.
weight_calibration_journey.w_0_05_final: walk-forward +2.373 (+0.226 vs v1_lsk3_g_v2), all regimes safe, rotation regime IMPROVED +0.527 from baseline. Pareto-optimal pick.

active_alternative_reason: SP-A v6 is the FIRST factor in M2.x track to combine: (1) doc-mechanism falsification PASS with 4× margin (E.12 t=+10.75 vs 2.5σ); (2) G1 strict + G6 strict + G3 perfect same-sign on the cross-sectional admission; (3) score-integrated cycle PASS with walk-forward improvement (+0.226) AND regime improvement (rotation +0.527) simultaneously. Best trend regime (+5.687) AND best rotation regime (-0.062) of any candidate while keeping worst regime safe (-1.851, comfortable margin from -2.0 floor). Active alternative alongside lsk3_g_v2 (best worst-regime margin), v3_lsk3_g_v2 (best regime breadth), v5_lsk3_g_v2 (best raw walk-forward at the cost of tight worst regime). Operator picks based on risk preference; v6 is the most balanced winner.
